name: Praline Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the dark brown sugar and 1/4 cup butter. Add evaporated milk and stir over low heat until the butter is melted.
2. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 8-inch square baking pan and sprinkle evenly with pecans.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream light brown sugar and the remaining butter. Add eggs one at a time, stirring in flour, vanilla extract, and salt until moistened.
4. Spread the batter over the pecans in the baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool for 5 minutes in the pan before inverting onto a serving plate. Allow to cool slightly before cutting.
